# Farghal X

## About
Farghal X is an AI automation agency that builds AI-powered systems for small and medium enterprises (SMEs). Founded by Ahmed Farghal, based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

## What We Do
We design and implement AI automation systems that replace manual, repetitive business processes — saving 10–30 hours per week for our clients.

## Services
- AI Strategy Consultation: Business process audit, AI opportunity identification, and ROI roadmap.
- AI Implementation Services: Lead qualification bots, CRM integration, and custom dashboards.
- Workflow Automation: Connecting existing tools via n8n and Make to eliminate manual data entry.

## Industries Served
Real Estate, Consultancies, Healthcare, E-commerce, Agencies

## Target Markets
- Southeast Asia (Malaysia, Singapore, Indonesia, Philippines)
- Middle East (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt)
- Australia & UK

## Contact
- Email: ahmed@farghalx.org
- Website: https://farghalx.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/AhmedFarghal25

- The WhatsApp Lead Responder: How Malaysian Agencies Close More Deals: Why forcing clients to wait 4 hours for a WhatsApp reply is killing your conversion rate.

- للستارت أبز المصرية — إزاي الأتمتة بتوفرلك فلوس التوظيف: توليد عملاء محتملين بالذكاء الاصطناعي وتوفير النفقات.
